function t(t)return Z[t-(-998552+1028750)]end for t,O in ipairs({{-1023209-(-1023210),144517+-144148};{412860-412859;-824889-(-824929)},{940259-940218,-1045667+1046036}})do while return(function(Z,W,j,o,K,T,X,U,Y,h,D,A,b,O,w,q,a,v,Q,s,L,P,C)P,v,h,b,D,a,U,Q,q,L,O,w,C,s,A,Y=function(Z,t)local W=b(t)local j=function(j)return O(Z,{j},t,W)end return j end,function(Z,t)local
